calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Trustee, National Default Services Company, To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j(C)&(D)
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Megan Lees Esq. of Tiffany & Bosco, P.A., 619-501-3503, appearing via court call for National Defualt Servicing, Plaintiff and moving party.

Colby LaVelle II, Esq., 925-351-4550, specially appearing for Michael Fox for Nicol Harris, Respondent and opposing party.

Hearing is held.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER IN RE 2315 DIVISADERO STREET B, Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Trustee, National Default Services Company, To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j(C)&(D)is moot. Deposit in the amount of $654,163.39 made on November 5, 2018. Order for the same signed in open court and forwarded to the staff attorney for review. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
